description_long: This is a tall, narrow apartment building with a steeply pitched roof and five visible floors, each featuring symmetrically arranged windows with white frames and sills. The facade is brown with white architectural accents, and the ground floor has a double-door entrance flanked by two windows. Above the entrance, a red illuminated sign reads 'Bettien Köln,' suggesting a possible commercial or residential function. The roof is dark brown with dormer windows and a single vertical chimney pipe. The rear and side walls are plain and unadorned, lacking windows or decorative features. The overall design is reminiscent of traditional European urban architecture, with a focus on verticality and compact footprint.
description: A tall, narrow brown apartment building with five floors, white-trimmed windows, a steep roof with dormers, and a red sign above the entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, five rows of symmetrically arranged windows, dormer windows on the roof, and a red sign above the door.
description_view_1: Angled side-rear view revealing the plain, windowless side wall and the sloped roof with a chimney pipe.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a completely unadorned, flat wall with no windows or doors, and the continuation of the roof.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the plain back and side walls, the roof's slope, and the chimney pipe.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical columns and horizontal rows, with each floor featuring two evenly spaced windows on the front facade and dormer windows on the roof.
